name: Tangy Mushroom Miso Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice the mushrooms.
2. Sauté mushrooms with balsamic vinegar in a large skillet until fully cooked. Remove mushrooms from the skillet and set aside, keeping the mushroom liquid in the skillet.
3. Add 3 cups water, miso, tamari, and nutritional yeast to the skillet. Whisk until thoroughly blended and simmer for a few minutes.
4. Add celery seed and black pepper to taste.
5. Add the mushrooms back into the skillet.
6. Mix together cornstarch and 1/4 cup water in a separate bowl to ensure the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
7. With the skillet over medium heat, add the cornstarch suspension to the gravy a little at a time, stirring continually.
8. Continue adding until the gravy reaches the desired thickness. Cook for an additional minute before serving immediately.
Note: If making ahead, prepare the miso-mushroom mixture without the cornstarch. When ready to serve, reheat the mixture and thicken before serving.
Makes 4 cups.
